name: Debbie Wasserman Schultz
subject: 100 women
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
|
---
| | I can't tell you how proud I am to write this sentence: **For the first time in our nation's history, at least 100 women are projected to serve in the House of Representatives.** Since the day he took office, and even before that, Trump has done nothing but demean and degrade women. His administration and his allies in Congress have tried to defund Planned Parenthood, restrict access to birth control, and erode women's rights. On Tuesday night, we rejected that agenda. We sent a clear message: This will NOT be the new normal in America. **And none of our success Tuesday night would have been possible without you.** Three statewide recounts have begun in Florida -- and might continue for some time. But I wanted to make sure that I took a moment to let you know how incredibly grateful and honored I am that the families of Florida put their trust in me to represent them. And I'm excited about what we can accomplish now that we have a Democratic majority! Thank you, all, for all of your help and support. I hope I can continue to count on you as we move forward. Debbie | | | [Donate Now](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113cf1/622b7b5b/1de1cda0/307b60a1/2244241049/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse181110nd?refcode=dwse181110nd_m&recurring=true&amount=5")
---

|
---
| | Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
---
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
[Click here to unsubscribe](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113cf1/622b7b5b/1de1cda0/307b60a0/2244241049/VEsE/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/unsubscribe")

name: Stacey Abrams
subject: they deserve justice
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stacey Abrams for Governor
body:
Over the last few days, our Voter Protection Hotline has heard thousands of stories of Georgia voters who had to fight for their right to vote. |
---
[](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa636/34a064cc/5060bff/70c1c1b/4033411863/VEsH/ "https://staceyabrams.com/")

| | | Friend: Last week, I met with Tate, Cassandra, Nedghie, Angel, Surabhi, Delaney, Cazembe, Amari, and Arnaud - Georgia voters from all walks of life who experienced difficulties casting their ballots or helping those who were having trouble. Whether they were first time voters, volunteers, or elected officials, they all felt dismayed and disillusioned by a democracy whose hurdles and failures made it nearly impossible to vote. Some were only able to vote through tenacity and sheer force of will. Many were left voiceless altogether. [](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa636/34a064cc/5060bff/70c1c18/4033411863/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUxMTEzMjAxOC1jIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-november?refcode=IE11132018-c") And they are not alone. Over the last few days, our Voter Protection Hotline has heard thousands of stories of Georgia voters who had to fight for their right to vote. We heard stories from voters who took time off work to vote, only to be turned away at their assigned polling precinct and every polling place they visited. Students and military service members who requested absentee ballots, but never received them, or else discovered their completed ballots were "lost in the mail." First time voters and long-time voters whose names were "no longer on the list." Their voices deserve to be heard. They deserve justice. That is why we will continue this fight, and why I'm asking you: **[Will you chip in $3 right away to help fund our efforts to find and count every outstanding ballot in Georgia? This is a big undertaking, but it is absolutely worth it.](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa636/34a064cc/5060bff/70c1c18/4033411863/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUxMTEzMjAxOC1jIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-november?refcode=IE11132018-c")** Make no mistake: Our democracy should work for all of us, regardless of political leanings, race, income, or region. Voting is a right, not a privilege. It is fundamental to our democracy and to our Georgia, and I will fight every single day until our government - a government of the people, by the people, and for the people - works for all of us. Yours, Stacey Abrams
---

**[DONATE](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa636/34a064cc/5060bff/70c1c18/4033411863/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUxMTEzMjAxOC1jIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-november?refcode=IE11132018-c")**

|
---
[](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa636/34a064cc/5060bff/70c1c19/4033411863/VEsD/ "https://www.facebook.com/stacey.abrams.77/") [](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa636/34a064cc/5060bff/70c1c26/4033411863/VEsA/ "https://twitter.com/staceyabrams") [](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa636/34a064cc/5060bff/70c1c27/4033411863/VEsB/ "https://www.instagram.com/staceyabrams/")

name: =?utf-8?Q?Chairman=20Kyle=20Hupfer?=
subject: Memo from the Chairman: It's about more than politics
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Indiana Republican Party
body:
The winning continues! News just broke that with one more victory in the Indiana House, Republicans will maintain our supermajorities in both... |
---
| |
---
| **Memo from the Chairman**
---
| Friends & Fellow Republicans –
One week ago today, Hoosier Republicans delivered again.

Standing on stage last Tuesday night, alongside Senator-elect Mike Braun, Senator Todd Young, Governor Eric Holcomb, and our amazing statewide team of Secretary of State Connie Lawson, Auditor Tera Klutz and Treasurer Kelly Mitchell, I couldn’t help but feel a sense of pride in all of our political accomplishments. The team, at every level, worked together to produce victory.

But I quickly snapped out of it, because this isn’t just about elections.

As Governor Eric Holcomb says, our work is about people, people, people. And with the results of the 2018 election now tabulated, and all the campaigning behind us, it’s time to double down on our results-oriented, people-focused policies that make Indiana a better place to live.

It’s this mentality that separates the Indiana Republican Party from the pack. We measure ourselves against ourselves, not against our political opponents. Yes, we hold more seats in our Congressional delegation and in the General Assembly. Yes, we hold every elected statewide office. Yes, we have maintained our position of political strength year after year after year. But that’s not what matters.

What matters is the sacred trust that Hoosiers have placed in us – Indiana’s _only_ Party of Purpose – to deliver on their behalf. It’s an awesome responsibility not only to win at the ballot box, but most importantly, to effectively govern. Just like we can’t rest on our laurels when it comes to winning elections, we similarly cannot become complacent when it comes to transparency and measuring results. And while every time we are called to serve - from the Courthouse, to the Statehouse, and all the way to the White House – we deliver, we must always push to go to the Next Level. It won’t just happen on its own.

So, where do we go from here?

I firmly believe that our continued success – as a party and as Hoosiers – is dependent upon the strength of our team. We’re among the luckiest – if not _the_ luckiest – states in the nation because of the caliber of candidates and elected officials we produce. We could export half of them to Illinois (which could use some help!), and we would still be the cream of the crop. That’s how deep our bench goes.

But as we sit here, on the precipice of the official start of the 2019 municipal election cycle, and the not-so-far-off 2020 elections, we need to grow our team. As the saying goes, politics is about addition, not subtraction. So I have a question for each of you: How will you help us grow the team in 2019?

Here at your Indiana Republican Party, we are already turning our attention to next year and working hard to answer that question for ourselves and our organization. But we can’t do it alone. We have to grow the team in rural, suburban and urban communities. We have to grow among every age and racial demographic. We have to grow everywhere.

I know we all want to take a breather after a bruising campaign cycle. But that's just not in the cards. The 2019 cycle doesn't begin today; it began the moment we put field staff on the ground in July 2017. The people we have met, the relationships we have built, the trust placed in us... this is our chance to deliver - again. Are you with me?

Kyle Hupfer, Chairman
Indiana Republican Party
---
| | | | | | | [](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=b7cac74db4&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| | [](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=b074b953f4&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| | [](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=89b5f9144b&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
|
---

[_why did I get this?_](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/about?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=70b6cdf951&e=1acd9bb3d6&c=b6f53b8621) [unsubscribe from this list](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=70b6cdf951&e=1acd9bb3d6&c=b6f53b8621) [update subscription preferences](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/profile?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=70b6cdf951&e=1acd9bb3d6)

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Vice President Mike Pence: Veterans Day – Veterans have no better friend than President Trump
body:
Vice President Mike Pence writes in Fox News that “the debt our nation owes those who have worn the uniform is a debt we will never be able... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=bf1f509dfe&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# Vice President Mike Pence: Veterans Day – Veterans have no better friend than President Trump

Vice President Mike Pence writes in Fox News that “the debt our nation owes those who have worn the uniform is a debt we will never be able to fully repay.”

But just as America’s veterans have fought for us, “our entire administration has fought for them,” the Vice President continues. “President Trump has signed the most substantial veterans’ health-care reform in a generation, making Veterans Choice a permanent part of American law.”

[**Click here to continue reading.**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f1bf108864&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “President Trump spoke without an umbrella during a cold, rainy Veterans Day ceremony in France. The ceremony at Suresnes American Cemetery near Paris was Trump's final scheduled stop before returning to the U.S.,” Steven Nelson reports for the _[**Washington Examiner**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=092704c29d&e=3ee4985eea)_. “It is our duty to preserve the civilization they defended and to protect the peace they so nobly gave their lives to secure one century ago,” President Trump said.
---
|
---
| In _[**The Hill**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=af46362fbb&e=3ee4985eea)_ , U.S. Ambassador to Poland Georgette Mosbacher and Polish Ambassador to the United States Piotr Wilczek write about America’s growing bond with Poland under President Trump. “Today, a century after Poland regained its independence, 30 years after the fall of communism and 20 years after Poland joined NATO, the bond between the United States and Poland is stronger than ever, and we are ready to face the next 100 years together.”
---
|
---
| In _[**The Daily Signal**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3fe8601af2&e=3ee4985eea)_ , Rachel Greszler details how President Trump has been cracking down on wasted time and money at the Department of Veterans Affairs (VA). Under the Obama Administration, excessive costs and detrimental activities were all too common at the VA. But “President [Donald] Trump has made it clear: VA employees should always put veterans first,” Acting VA Assistant Secretary Jacquelyn Hayes-Byrd said.
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d5889bc3b6&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6e8ca07f3b&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=755a8d6009)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: Newt Gingrich
subject: ALERT: Recount in Florida
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
_Please see a special message from our sponsor._ |
---
* * *
After Tuesday night, the people of Florida had a winner in the race for the U.S. Senate — Governor Rick Scott. But today, Bill Nelson is calling for a recount, hiring a high-priced D.C. lawyer and forcing the state to undergo the costly process. He will do anything to keep his grip on power, no matter the cost to his state. But it's not just the people of Florida who will pay to prove what we all know — that Rick Scott will soon be Florida's next Senator — **[the campaign will have to fight to ensure every vote is counted correctly](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE4MzE3LWM0ZDIxZGYzNjJmNDRkYzI5YmQ1ODlhMWM5N2ZkODI0%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9yaWNrLXNjb3R0LWZvci1mbG9yaWRhLzE3NDEw&K=cJu1yjtfYlxo5tDWs_-9Uw)**. Bill Nelson's new lawyer (the same lawyer who represents Hillary Clinton, Nancy Pelosi, and Chuck Schumer) says “ _We're doing it to win,_ ” even though the people of Florida made their choice clear on Election Night — and Bill Nelson didn't win. His statement speaks volumes. He’s admitting that Nelson didn’t win back his seat through the will of Florida voters, so they're trying to steal it back through the courts. With so much at stake, we can’t let them pull this off. [Team Scott has opened up an emergency fund for the recount, and we need you to donate right now](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE4MzE3LWM0ZDIxZGYzNjJmNDRkYzI5YmQ1ODlhMWM5N2ZkODI0%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9yaWNrLXNjb3R0LWZvci1mbG9yaWRhLzE3NDEw&K=Qh7H2iuJPTS8uTBAs2NQ7A). We must ensure no funny business takes this victory away from conservatives who fought so hard to win this election rightfully. [](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE4MzE3LWM0ZDIxZGYzNjJmNDRkYzI5YmQ1ODlhMWM5N2ZkODI0%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9yaWNrLXNjb3R0LWZvci1mbG9yaWRhLzE3NDEw&K=ChObvrNtbeF9Uico5iic_g) **Your support today is as vital as it's ever been**. Bill Nelson has been in government for 46 years, _and he's shown in the last two days that the voices of the people aren't going to be enough to take away the power he's accumulated_. The voters of Florida chose Rick Scott to represent them. [Stand with them today and ensure their vote is what mattered](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE4MzE3LWM0ZDIxZGYzNjJmNDRkYzI5YmQ1ODlhMWM5N2ZkODI0%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9yaWNrLXNjb3R0LWZvci1mbG9yaWRhLzE3NDEw&K=aTmRpdJ80oPGfxPdLZ9STA). [](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE4MzE3LWM0ZDIxZGYzNjJmNDRkYzI5YmQ1ODlhMWM5N2ZkODI0%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3ANA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9yaWNrLXNjb3R0LWZvci1mbG9yaWRhLzE3NDEw&K=XBhzzjXI1p98UOcFHyMtbA) Sincerely, Newt Gingrich

| Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
---
107 S. West Street • #115 • Alexandria, VA 22314
**[Unsubscribe](http://trk.listelixr.net/u/1/99260697/02-b18317-c4d21df362f44dc29bd589a1c97fd824/28254928/qcjvyyvf12/tznvy/pbz?f=t)**

But it's not just the people of Florida who will pay to prove what we all know — that Rick Scott will soon be Florida's next Senator — . Bill Nelson's new lawyer (the same lawyer who represents Hillary Clinton, Nancy Pelosi, and Chuck Schumer) says “ We're doing it to win, ” even though the people of Florida made their choice clear on Election Night — and Bill Nelson didn't win. His statement speaks volumes. He’s admitting that Nelson didn’t win back his seat through the will of Florida voters, so they're trying to steal it back through the courts. With so much at stake, we can’t let them pull this off. . We must ensure no funny business takes this victory away from conservatives who fought so hard to win this election rightfully. Your support today is as vital as it's ever been. Bill Nelson has been in government for 46 years, and he's shown in the last two days that the voices of the people aren't going to be enough to take away the power he's accumulated. The voters of Florida chose Rick Scott to represent them. . Sincerely, Newt Gingrich | Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida 107 S. West Street • #115 • Alexandria, VA 22314 **

name: Tina Smith
subject: Florida recount: please read
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Our work isn't over quite yet.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm4nelson?refcode=rtw_20181113_em-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Sturgeon Lake&state=MN&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Friend, The hard work we put in together to stop Donald Trump and the GOP from turning Senate seats red isn't over quite yet. **My friend Senator Bill Nelson 's race in Florida is too close to call, and a recount is underway right now.** Recounts are expensive. They require top lawyers, extra staff, and a strong voter protection program. And we know that Senator Nelson's opponent -- a self-funding millionaire who has poured tens of millions of dollars of his own money into this race already -- will do anything to win. **[That's why I'm personally asking you today: Will you chip in $10 right now to Senator Nelson's recount fund? We need to make sure his team has the resources to ensure every single vote is counted in this critical race.](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm4nelson?refcode=rtw_20181113_em-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Sturgeon Lake&state=MN&phone=&employer=&occupation=")** Senator Nelson's opponent will stop at nothing to win, and Trump and big Republican donors are ready to do whatever it takes to make their Senate majority even stronger. Grassroots donors like you will make the difference in counting every vote accurately and fairly. **The recount is already underway, so please chip in $10 or whatever you can right now:[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm4nelson](https://action.tinaforminnesota. name: MaggieHassan.com
subject: urgent: voter suppression in Georgia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hello -- Here's a quick update about the Georgia Governor's race:
* **No media outlet has called this race** because it is simply too close
* Stacey Abrams' team has filed lawsuits to accept provisional and absentee ballots that might otherwise be rejected for minor errors
* Stacey's team is making sure that every vote is counted after relentless efforts to suppress voters, particularly people of color, at the hands of her opponent, Georgia Secretary of State Brian Kemp.

This work is extremely expensive, but it's also extremely important. Stacey isn't giving up and neither can we.
[**Just $3 -- or more, if you're able -- will go a long way toward achieving justice in Georgia and ensuring that Stacey knows you're with her until every vote is counted. Please rush $3 or more to her campaign right now.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc107/2a380d31/347deb48/f1797c/1085382794/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAxOF9td2g0YWJyYW1zIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAxODExMTNfTVdINEFicmFtc182bW8iLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2018_mwh4abrams?refcode=e20181113_MWH4Abrams_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")
Thank you for fighting for what's right.
--Team Maggie

name: Jay Inslee
subject: One week later
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
We made big progress -- but we can't stop now.

| [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7b0ae/2f5ea88d/7b4634fc/2cbdbc79/617147567/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/power-our-progress?utm_source=ema_2018-11-13_pre-feeze-2&refcode=ema_2018-11-13_pre-feeze-2&utm_campaign=pre-feeze-2&utm_medium=ema") Dear Friend, One week later, I'm still glowing from the results of the midterm election. We flipped the US House of Representatives, replacing Trump rubber stamps with the youngest, most diverse House ever. We flipped SEVEN governors' seats, the most in 24 years -- and soon, more than half of Americans will be able to look to their State Capitol and know that they have a Democratic governor on the job fighting for them. And we won big here in Washington -- with majorities secured in the state House and state Senate, we'll continue to lead the country in our progressive policy initiatives. Across the country, we voted for those who will protect health care access for people with pre-existing conditions, invest in strong public schools, take action on climate change, and fight for an inclusive economy with opportunities for all. It's remarkable. I'm especially proud of this movement right now. But one week out, I'm already thinking about the next fights to come. Trump is bound to continue leading our country backwards into chaos and distraction. The Senate is posed to continue to confirm his extreme appointees. And Republican state houses will continue to disenfranchise millions of Americans by redistricting their voices out of the picture in 2020. [**We've got to get to work on laying the groundwork for battles to come. And to do that, we've got to start now. Are you ready to step up?**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7b0ae/2f5ea88d/7b4634fc/2cbdbc79/617147567/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/power-our-progress?utm_source=ema_2018-11-13_pre-feeze-2&refcode=ema_2018-11-13_pre-feeze-2&utm_campaign=pre-feeze-2&utm_medium=ema") There's one more date on my mind: Saturday, December 15. That's when our team hits our legally mandated, fundraising freeze for 2018. We won't be able to raise any money to fight for progress for months -- and who knows what could happen in that time. **So on behalf of our progressive movement, I'm asking you to step up now.** Let's lay the groundwork for more progress to come, and do so NOW, before we miss our chance. Let's make sure we're prepared to keep claiming victories on all the issues we care about, now and in the long-term. And let's make sure we're ready to fight back all winter, no matter what Trump does. [**We have a pre-freeze deadline this Thursday, 11/15, to make sure we can last through the winter. We need to hit $15,000 before then to keep going strong. Can I count on you to power our progress in the future, before we hit our freeze?**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7b0ae/2f5ea88d/7b4634fc/2cbdbc79/617147567/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/power-our-progress?utm_source=ema_2018-11-13_pre-feeze-2&refcode=ema_2018-11-13_pre-feeze-2&utm_campaign=pre-feeze-2&utm_medium=ema") Very truly yours, Jay Inslee | [CONTRIBUTE »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7b0ae/2f5ea88d/7b4634fc/2cbdbc79/617147567/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/power-our-progress?utm_source=ema_2018-11-13_pre-feeze-2&refcode=ema_2018-11-13_pre-feeze-2&utm_campaign=pre-feeze-2&utm_medium=ema")
---

_Now more than ever, we must support progressive leadership in America. Chip in to show you're with Jay Inslee as we fight for progress in Washington state and around the country._

| [CONTRIBUTE »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7b0ae/2f5ea88d/7b4634fc/2cbdbc79/617147567/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/power-our-progress?utm_source=ema_2018-11-13_pre-feeze-2&refcode=ema_2018-11-13_pre-feeze-2&utm_campaign=pre-feeze-2&utm_medium=ema")
---

[Click here to unsubscribe](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7b0ae/2f5ea88d/7b4634fc/2cbdbc78/617147567/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). name: Team Tabitha
subject: The proof is in the pudding. So thank you.
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP01/1/62300/images/TI-Email-Theme-Header.png]

Thank you! Together, we did something really amazing!

Watch Tabitha's concession speech here: https://www.wsfa.com/video/2018/11/07/raw-video-tabitha-isner-speaks-after-losing-congressional-race-2/

We fought for the heart and soul of this country, and we made a real difference in the political conversation in Alabama. How do I know?

I know because I heard from Lance in Tallassee who said: "I am so proud that I was one of Barack Obama’s his first 100,000 supporters. He always made me proud. I am still proud. But, I can honestly say that today, I am prouder of my support for you, Tabitha."

I know because I heard from Amanda in Dothan who said: "Thank you for making me feel not so alone. Thank you for giving me hope. Thank you for giving us a platform to find the best in one another. Thank you for opening that door. "

I know because I heard from hundreds of people how much this campaign meant to them.

And if that wasn't enough, I know because the numbers prove it.

In AL-02 counties, Tabitha earned 7% more votes than the other Democrats on the ballot!*
*Excluding Montgomery County because it's really hard to pull comparable numbers for other candidates since Montgomery is gerrymandered into three pieces (which is an important topic we should discuss sometime, but let's save it for another day).

Hold your head high. You've earned it.

Connect With Us:Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/TabithaIsner]
Twitter [http://www.twitter.com/TabithaK]
Have ideas on how to make AL-02 better? Call the office at 334-425-8626

Correspondence can be sent to:
PO Box 6340
Montgomery, AL 36106

Campaign HQ Address:
1460 Ann St.
Montgomery, AL 36107

name: Lauren Groh-Wargo, StaceyAbrams.com
subject: Unless we fight back now, this will happen again.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stacey Abrams for Governor
body:
Brian Kemp used his office as Secretary of State to make it harder, and often impossible, for some Georgians to vote. Now, his office is lying about the number of votes cast. |
---
[](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa60c/34a064cc/5675c2b/70c18e7/3969029323/VEsH/ "https://staceyabrams.com/")

| | | Friend, The bedrock of our campaign has always been to lift up the voices of those who have been unseen and unheard, in a Georgia where for too long, too many have been left behind. That is just as true today, no matter who wins this election. I want to be clear: There are enough uncounted ballots out there to send us to a recount or a runoff election. But that's not the point. The point is, Brian Kemp used his office as Secretary of State to make it harder, and often impossible, for some Georgians to vote. Now, his office is lying about the number of votes cast and the number of ballots still uncounted. He is trying to steal this election in front of the entire world. It's unacceptable, it's undemocratic, and we won't let him get away with it. Now is not the time to sit down. Now is the time to fight back! Because unless we show Brian Kemp and every other agent of voter suppression that we will NEVER accept anything less than fair elections, they will pull the same stunts again and again, election after election. This ends now, and Stacey Abrams is the fighter we need to lead the charge against voter suppression. I'm proud to stand alongside her today to continue this fight, for as long as it takes. Will you fight with us? **[Chip in $3 to help our team defend democracy here in Georgia. This is not just about this election, it's about every election yet to come. It's about proving that voter suppression cannot and will not win elections.](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa60c/34a064cc/5675c2b/70c18e4/3969029323/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUxMTEzMjAxOC4yLWZ1bGwifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-november?refcode=IE11132018.2-full")** Georgians on both sides of the aisle are deeply concerned about the integrity of our election system. As a matter of basic fairness, we must ensure that every eligible Georgian's vote is counted, and pledge to prevent this kind of voter suppression from happening ever again. Our democracy -- and our people -- deserve no less. \- Lauren Groh-Wargo
Campaign Manager
#TeamAbrams
---

**[DONATE](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa60c/34a064cc/5675c2b/70c18e4/3969029323/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUxMTEzMjAxOC4yLWZ1bGwifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-november?refcode=IE11132018.2-full")**

|

clean_body: Brian Kemp used his office as Secretary of State to make it harder, and often impossible, for some Georgians to vote. Now, his office is lying about the number of votes cast. | "" | | | Friend, The bedrock of our campaign has always been to lift up the voices of those who have been unseen and unheard, in a Georgia where for too long, too many have been left behind. That is just as true today, no matter who wins this election. I want to be clear: There are enough uncounted ballots out there to send us to a recount or a runoff election. But that's not the point. The point is, Brian Kemp used his office as Secretary of State to make it harder, and often impossible, for some Georgians to vote. Now, his office is lying about the number of votes cast and the number of ballots still uncounted. He is trying to steal this election in front of the entire world. It's unacceptable, it's undemocratic, and we won't let him get away with it. Now is not the time to sit down. Now is the time to fight back! Because unless we show Brian Kemp and every other agent of voter suppression that we will NEVER accept anything less than fair elections, they will pull the same stunts again and again, election after election. This ends now, and Stacey Abrams is the fighter we need to lead the charge against voter suppression. I'm proud to stand alongside her today to continue this fight, for as long as it takes. Will you fight with us? "" Georgians on both sides of the aisle are deeply concerned about the integrity of our election system. As a matter of basic fairness, we must ensure that every eligible Georgian's vote is counted, and pledge to prevent this kind of voter suppression from happening ever again. Our democracy -- and our people -- deserve no less. \- Lauren Groh-Wargo Campaign Manager #TeamAbrams "" | "" "" "" 1270 Caroline Street Suite D120-447 Atlanta, GA 30307 (C)2018 Stacey Abrams for Governor, All rights reserved "" | | Paid for by Stacey Abrams for Governor
